attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT 
CAST('1900-01-01 00:00:00' AS TIMESTAMP(0))  CDB_DEQUEUE_TIME, 
TRX_SC.CREATION_DATE,
SC.DEBIT_CREDIT_CODE,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS ETL_PROCESS_DTM,
'UO',
TRX_SC.LAST_UPDATE_DATE,
TRX_SC.LATEST_SC_FLAG,
EXT.JTF_TERRITORIES_ID AS OTM_TERR_ID,  /*  ADDED  AS PART OF  D1FY14*/
TERR.NAME AS OTM_TERR_NAME,    /*  ADDED  AS PART OF  D1FY14*/
TYP.NAME AS OTM_TERR_TYPE_CODE,  /*  ADDED  AS PART OF  D1FY14*/
TRX_HIST.TRX_NUMBER AS POS_TRANS_ID,
COALESCE(ASGN.CLASS_CODE,'Y')REBOK_CHANNEL_FLAG,   /*  ADDED  AS PART OF  D1FY14*/
SC.SALESREP_NUMBER,
SC.SC_ASSIGNMENT_MODE_CODE,
SC.LAST_UPDATE_DATE  AS SC_LAST_UPD_DATE,   /*  ADDED  AS PART OF  D1FY14*/
COALESCE(SC.SC_REASON_CODE, 'UNKNOWN' ),  /*  ADDED  AS PART OF  D1FY14*/
SC.SC_SPLIT_PERCENT,
SC.SC_TYPE_CODE,
SC.SC_UNALLOCATED,  /*  ADDED  AS PART OF  D1FY14*/
SC.SC_USAGE_CODE,   /*  ADDED  AS PART OF  D1FY14*/
SC.SHR_NODE_ID,
SC.TERRITORY_TYPE_CODE,
TRX_SC.TRX_SC_ID,    
TRX_HIST.TRX_SOURCE_TYPE,
USR.USER_NAME,
POS.WIPS_COST_PRICE,
POS.WIPS_LIST_PRICE,
POS.WIPS_UNIT_PRICE,
TRX_SC.SC_ID AS SK3_SC_ID_INT,					 /*  ADDED  AS PART OF  IDE */
TRX_SC.LAST_UPDATE_DATE AS LAST_UPDATED_DTM,			 /*  ADDED  AS PART OF  IDE */	
TRUNC(TRX_SC.LAST_UPDATE_DATE) AS DV_LAST_UPDATED_DT,		/*  ADDED  AS PART OF  IDE */
TRX_SC.LATEST_SC_FLAG AS LATEST_SALES_CREDIT_FLG,		/*  ADDED  AS PART OF  IDE */
CASE 
  WHEN TRX_HIST.CHANGE_TYPE_CODE = 'DL' THEN 'Y' 
  WHEN POS.DIST_TO_DIST_TRANS_FLAG = 'Y' THEN 'Y'
ELSE 'N'
END AS SOURCE_DELETED_FLG,
COALESCE(TRX_SC.SC_DUPLICATE_FLAG,'N')  AS  SALES_CREDIT_DUPLICATE_FLG	,	 /*  ADDED  AS PART OF  IDE */
CASE WHEN TRX_SC.SC_DUPLICATE_FLAG='Y' THEN 'Y'
 ELSE 'N' 
 END AS TRX_VERSION_CHANGE_FLG,  /* ADDED AS PART OF IDE Retirement Q1FY15 */
COALESCE(EXT.DIST_OFFSET_FLAG,'N')   AS DISTRIBUTOR_BUCKET_FLG,  /* ADDED AS PART OF IDE Retirement Q1FY15 */
COALESCE(START_DATE,TIMESTAMP '1900-01-01 00:00:00' ) AS START_DATE,
COALESCE(EXPIRATION_DATE,TIMESTAMP '3500-01-01 00:00:00') AS EXPIRATION_DATE , 
EXT.UCRM_CASE_NUM
FROM 
(SELECT * FROM $$NRTACCUMVWDB.XXOTM_PHX_TRX_SC
WHERE LAST_UPDATE_DATE>CAST('$$LastExtractDate' AS TIMESTAMP(0)) - INTERVAL '2' HOUR
 QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY TRX_SC_ID ORDER BY REFRESH_DATETIME DESC)=1) TRX_SC
INNER JOIN
(SELECT * FROM $$GGSRCVWDB.XXOTM_PHX_SALES_CREDITS
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY  SC_ID ORDER BY REFRESH_DATETIME DESC)=1) SC
ON TRX_SC.SC_ID=SC.SC_ID
LEFT  JOIN
(SELECT * FROM $$GGSRCVWDB.XXOTM_PHX_POS
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY  TRX_ID ORDER BY REFRESH_DATETIME DESC)=1) POS
ON TRX_SC.TRX_ID=POS.TRX_ID
INNER JOIN 
(SELECT * FROM $$GGSRCVWDB.XXOTM_PHX_SALES_CREDITS_EXT
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY  SC_EXT_ID ORDER BY REFRESH_DATETIME DESC)=1) EXT
ON SC.SC_ID=EXT.SC_ID
LEFT JOIN 
(SELECT * FROM $$GGSRCVWDB.JTF_TERR_ALL
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY  TERR_ID,ORG_ID ORDER BY REFRESH_DATETIME DESC)=1) TERR
ON EXT.JTF_TERRITORIES_ID=TERR.TERR_ID
LEFT  JOIN
(SELECT * FROM $$GGSRCVWDB.JTF_TERR_TYPES_ALL
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY  TERR_TYPE_ID,ORG_ID ORDER BY REFRESH_DATETIME DESC)=1) TYP
ON EXT.JTF_TERR_TYPE_ID=TYP.TERR_TYPE_ID
LEFT JOIN 
(SELECT * FROM $$GGSRCVWDB.XXOTM_PHX_CODE_ASSIGNMENTS
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY  CODE_ASSIGNMENT_ID ORDER BY REFRESH_DATETIME DESC)=1) ASGN
ON TRX_SC.TRX_SC_ID =ASGN.OWNER_TABLE_ID
AND ASGN.OWNER_TABLE_NAME ='XXOTM_PHX_TRX_SC'
AND ASGN.CLASS_CATEGORY= 'XXOTM_PHX_CB_FLAG'
INNER JOIN
(SELECT * FROM $$GGSRCVWDB.FND_USER
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY  USER_NAME ,USER_ID ORDER BY REFRESH_DATETIME DESC)=1) USR
ON SC.CREATED_BY=USR.USER_ID
INNER JOIN 
(SELECT * FROM $$GGSRCVWDB.XXOTM_PHX_TRX_HISTORY
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY  TRX_ID ORDER BY REFRESH_DATETIME DESC)=1) TRX_HIST
ON TRX_SC.TRX_ID = TRX_HIST.TRX_ID
AND TRX_HIST.TRX_SOURCE_TYPE IN ('POS','OFFSET')
WHERE 1=2
